Row.Text: +100% [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold towards converting a [icon:YIELD_TOWNS] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TOWN_TOOLTIP]Town[/TIP] adjacent to a Navigable River to a [icon:YIELD_CITIES] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_CITIES_TOOLTIP]City[/TIP].

[LIST][LI]+100% [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold towards converting a [icon:YIELD_TOWNS] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_TOWN_TOOLTIP]Town[/TIP] adjacent to a Navigable River to a [icon:YIELD_CITIES] [TIP:LOC_PEDIA_CONCEPTS_CITIES_TOOLTIP]City[/TIP].[LI][B]+30% [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production [/B]towards constructing the [B]Larabanga Mosque[/B].[/LIST]
